Every job passes through the same checklist as this panel — inspected, labeled, and switched on safely.

What Abraham Electrician Does

Full-service electrical work, done to code.

From small repairs to whole-home rewiring, here's the work we handle every week.

Wiring & Rewiring

New circuit runs, whole-home rewires, and fixing outdated or unsafe wiring behind the walls.

Panel Upgrades & Breaker Boxes

Replacing old fuse boxes, upgrading amperage, and installing new circuit breakers safely.

Lighting Installation

Recessed lighting, chandeliers, outdoor fixtures, and dimmer switches installed and wired properly.

Outlet & Switch Repair

Replacing worn outlets, adding GFCI protection, and fixing switches that spark, buzz, or don't work.

Ceiling Fan Installation

Mounting and wiring ceiling fans, including adding new switches or remote controls.

EV Charger Installation

Dedicated circuits and Level 2 charger installs for home electric vehicle charging.

Generator Installation & Hookup

Backup generator wiring and transfer switch installation so the power stays on when it matters.

Troubleshooting & Repairs

Tracking down flickering lights, tripped breakers, dead outlets, and other electrical gremlins.

Code Compliance & Inspections

Bringing older homes up to current electrical code and prepping panels for inspection or resale.

Surge Protection

Whole-house surge protectors to keep appliances and electronics safe from power spikes.

Smoke & CO Detector Installation

Hardwired smoke and carbon monoxide detectors installed and interconnected for safety.

Residential & Commercial Wiring

New construction, remodels, and commercial tenant build-outs wired from the ground up.

The Business

Meet Abraham Electrician

Abraham Electrician is a locally owned electrical contracting business built on one idea: do the job right, explain it clearly, and leave every panel safer than we found it.

Every project — whether it's a single outlet or a full rewire — gets the same attention to detail, clean workmanship, and respect for your home or business.

✓Years of Experience
100%Secured
24/7Emergency Calls

Where We Work

Homes, sites, and buildings of every kind.

Abraham Electrician wires and maintains properties across residential, institutional, and commercial settings.

Hospitals & Clinics

Reliable power, backup wiring, and code-compliant installs for healthcare facilities.

Schools

Classroom lighting, lab power circuits, and safe wiring for busy school buildings.

Universities

Large-scale wiring, panel upgrades, and lighting for lecture halls and campus buildings.

Duplexes

Full electrical layouts for multi-floor duplexes, from the meter to the last switch.

Apartments & Estates

Unit wiring, shared-area lighting, and panel work across multi-unit residential buildings.

Private Homes

Everyday residential wiring, repairs, and upgrades for single-family houses.

What We Wire & Install

Wiring, piping, and the appliances that run on them.

From the cable in the wall to the appliance it powers — here's what we handle on every job.

Wiring & Cable

Copper cable runs sized and routed correctly for every circuit.

Conduit Piping

PVC and metal conduit installed to protect and route wiring cleanly.

Air Conditioners

Dedicated circuits and safe hookups for split and window AC units.

Refrigerators & Freezers

Correct wiring and outlets for kitchen and cold-storage appliances.

Washing Machines

Grounded, splash-safe circuits for laundry appliances.

Cookers & Ovens

High-load circuits wired safely for kitchen ranges and ovens.

Water Heaters

Safe, dedicated wiring for instant and tank-style water heaters.

Water Pumps

Wiring and control hookups for borehole and booster pump systems.

Inverters & Solar Batteries

Transfer switches and wiring for inverter and backup battery systems.

On The Job

Real wiring, ceilings, and finished rooms.

A look at the day-to-day: men on the job, panels opened up, conduit pipe and wire runs, framing and drywall in progress, custom gypsum ceilings and LED wall units, and the screwdrivers and pliers we bring to every task.
